testcase.name: test_admin_orders_returns_data_and_pagination

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get admin token assert None

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase39_datetime_helpers_refactoring.py:192: in test_admin_orders_returns_data_and_pagination assert token, "Failed to get admin token" E AssertionError: Failed to get admin token E assert None

testcase.name: test_admin_orders_unauthenticated

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 429 assert 429 in [401, 403] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase39_datetime_helpers_refactoring.py:218: in test_admin_orders_unauthenticated assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 429 E assert 429 in [401, 403] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get admin token assert None

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase39_datetime_helpers_refactoring.py:224: in test_admin_delivery_all_returns_data_and_pagination assert token, "Failed to get admin token" E AssertionError: Failed to get admin token E assert None
